I wanted to share the huge news coming out of Pennsylvania! This afternoon(10/9) PA House Bill 2268 has passed a bill to help kids who stutter. I’m happy to play a small role in a major impact !! Now onto The Gov.Desk https://t.co/YOenylfmrT

RT @RepMarkosek: I want to thank NBA veteran @MKG14 for his support of this bill. Now it heads to Gov. Shapiro’s desk!

GSW 23 SAC 20, 3:23 left in the first and Curry has 8 and so does DeRozan.
GSW 31 SAC 27, end of the first and it's a fast paced game. GSW is shooting 57% and Sac 45.8%.
